title: Coolvetica For Minecraft
description:
A font replacement texture pack for Minecraft. 
REQUIRES CAXTON
body:
### Preview:
![Picture preview of the font in a minecraft book and quill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1870cdda5f145916dcf536922d91442af24d4027_0.webp)

### Requirements:
-  Minecraft: Version 1.18.2+
- Caxton Mod: Make sure it is installed, or the font will not show correctly

### Install:
1. Install Caxton Mod if not already
1. Drag and drop .zip file into resourcepacks folder
1. Apply in Minecraft Resource Packs Menu
